This classification places Callista gordonii as a type of sea snail or abalone. The family Ranellidae is a group of large sea snails that are typically found in tropical and subtropical waters. Members of this family are known for their large, thick shells and are often found in shallow, coastal areas. The classification of Callista gordonii reflects its unique characteristics and its position within the larger group of mollusks.
